document.docAuthor: Zhou, Ya-Dong, Mwachala, Geoffrey, Hu, Guang-Wan & Wang, Qing-Feng
document.masterDocTitle: Annotated checklist of the vascular plants of Mount Kenya, East Africa

subSubSection.paragraph: Habitat: LMWF, BZ, UMF, HZ; 1 400–3 600 m. Distribution: II.
Voucher: Chogoria Track, Alt. 2 872 m, 27 Jan. 2015, SAJIT 002892 (HIB).
References: Fries (1923b), Friis (1989), Bussmann (1993, 1994), Bussmann & Beck (1995a, 1998), Agnew (2013).
